name: thieves_den
description: A labyrinth of tunnels and hideouts beneath the city streets, used by an organised ring of thieves. Someone has left a trail of notes — and they lead somewhere far more dangerous.
note_texts: A crumpled ledger page: names, dates, and numbers. Someone has been tracking payments to a person called the Warden.
Scratched into the wall: 'For those who prove themselves — the Sanctum awaits. Ask no questions.'
A torn letter warning a member to stay away from the eastern tunnels. No reason is given.
A wax-sealed map fragment. The seal is unfamiliar — a shadow behind a locked door.
The last passage opens into a vaulted chamber. At the far end, a reinforced door bears the same seal. The Rogue Sanctum lies beyond.
unlock_message: You have uncovered the Rogue Sanctum — the guild's inner refuge.
